creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lbartoletti from comment #0)

Loïc,

To be honest, I also thought about a LTR version as an extra port.

So yes, I appreciate your initiative and I would like to maintain this one, too.

Many, many thanks for your efforts in creating the ltr port and also for the science/szip dependency, so far overlooked by me.
